---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A short description of the feature you'd like.

## Motivation
Why is this feature useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you'd like it to work (e.g., new endpoint, new field, query parameter).

## Alternatives Considered
Any other approaches you considered, and why you prefer this one.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, mockups, or examples here.
